{{Quote|Across the Gorge of Fire? That's too dangerous to even hang glide across!|[[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]]|<ref name="ewoks" />}}
The '''Gorge of Fire''' was a long, broad and deep canyon on the forest moon of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] that separated the forests of the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] from the land of [[Zandor]]. Enormous, never-ending [[Fire/Legends|flames]] stood up from its bottom along its entire length, making it impossible to cross unless one was in possession of the [[bridge crystal]]. Those that possessed the crystal could conjure the legendary [[Rainbow Bridge]], which allowed passage across the Gorge of Fire.<ref name="ewoks" />

==Appearances==
*[[Ewoks (1985) 1|''Ewoks'' (1985) 1]] {{1st}}
